---
title: Pitambar's paper on ionic liquid-derived carbon electrodes for vanadium flow batteries
date: 2025-06-14
categories: [Publication]
---

Congratulations to Pitambar Poudel on his <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.carbon.2025.120510" target="_blank">paper</a> in Carbon investigating ionic liquid-derived carbon materials as electrode catalysts for the V<sup>4+</sup>/V<sup>5+</sup> redox reaction in vanadium redox flow batteries. The study shows improved activity and kinetics at ionic liquid-derived carbons compared to conventional electrodes, and links the improvements to nitrogen, oxygen, and phosphorus heteroatom content. A collaborative effort with Owen Curnow, Harikrishnan Raghavan, and Chang Wu. Well done Pitambar!
